{{Infobox location
| name = arena (Cradle)
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Arenas serve as diverse combat venues throughout the series, ranging from permanent structures to specialized, temporary battlefields. Some arenas are massive, circular or oval facilities constructed of materials like [[orus wood]] or stone, featuring tiered seating organized by clan colors and towers for [[Monarch factions]] to observe from floating platforms. These permanent structures may include etched [[scripts]] to contain power or specific floor divisions to accommodate different combatant ranks, such as [[Foundation]] children, [[Coppers]], [[Irons]], or [[Jades]]. Many arenas are highly customized or magically manipulated to influence specific matches. These specialized environments can include terrain made of white sand, irregular stone, or even solidified blood and sharpened bones. Some are designed as three-dimensional mazes of [[steel]] and falling rock, while others utilize pillars to restrict movement or force combatants to rely on spiritual perception. Combat can also take place in isolated spaces sealed off by [[madra]], which cuts off the audience's ability to hear or sense the fighters directly. In certain instances, entire facilities—including arenas and supporting city-sized infrastructure—are grown on trees specifically to host tournaments.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Wei clan]]'s new arena is circular, made of [[orus wood]], and features a large script to prevent power spillover.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The arena is a square of pure white stone a hundred yards to a side, divided into eight sections by lines in the floor.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The arena is a huge square of pale stone.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The grand arena has a dark gray and smooth floor.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The arena was sealed off and featured waterfalls and pools.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The matches take place in an arena.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The arena is a place where fighters compete in front of a crowd.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
